top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    ca_state,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
    JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_month_seq BETWEEN 1212 AND 1212
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id,
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id,
    ca_state
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    ws_item_sk,
    ca_state,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
JOIN 
    customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_month_seq >= 1212 AND d_month_seq <= 1212
GROUP BY 
    ws_item_sk,
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    ws_item_sk ASC,
    ca_state ASC
LIMIT 100;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    ca_state,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
    JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_month_seq BETWEEN 1212 AND 1212
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id,
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id,
    ca_state
LIMIT 100;
